41:20.arabic: حَتَّى إِذَا مَا جَاءُوهَا شَهِدَ عَلَيْهِمْ سَمْعُهُمْ وَأَبْصَارُهُمْ وَجُلُودُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ
41:20.english: Until, when they reach it, their hearing and their sight and their skins will testify against them for what they used to do.
41:20.score_notes: Day of Judgment — body parts testify against their owners. Short, vivid, shocking imagery.

lesson_use.arabic: شَهِدَ عَلَيْهِمْ سَمْعُهُمْ وَأَبْصَارُهُمْ وَجُلُودُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ
lesson_use.english: Their hearing, their sight, and their skins testified against them for what they used to do
lesson_use.notes: Day of Judgment — body parts testify against their owners. Short, vivid, shocking imagery.

41:15.arabic: فَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَقَالُوا۟ مَنْ أَشَدُّ مِنَّا قُوَّةً ۖ أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَهُمْ هُوَ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُمْ قُوَّةً
41:15.english: As for Aad, they were arrogant on earth without right and said: Who is mightier than us? Did they not see that Allah who created them is mightier than them?
41:15.score_notes: Aad's arrogant boast + Allah's comeback — punchy despite length.

lesson_use.heading: 12 · اسْتَكْبَرُوا (were arrogant)
lesson_use.arabic: فَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَ**اسْتَكْبَرُوا** فِي الْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ الْحَقِّ وَقَالُوا مَنْ أَشَدُّ مِنَّا قُوَّةً ۖ أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا أَنَّ اللَّهَ الَّذِي خَلَقَهُمْ هُوَ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُمْ قُوَّةً
lesson_use.english: As for ʿĀd, they were **arrogant** on earth without right and said: Who is mightier than us in strength? Did they not see that Allah who created them is mightier than them in strength?
lesson_use.notes: An entire civilisation that said: "Who is mightier than us?" The Qur'an's answer is devastating. Notice **اسْتَكْبَرُوا** — the same word as Iblīs, but now it's a whole nation.
